title: Fragment: The Questions
description: Found before the throne room doors after defeating the Curator. A vial of something warm, labeled in the Curator's handwriting. The flame she carried was already burning when she arrived. This is the moment she finally asked why.

lines: The antechamber hearth still burned. Whatever had happened here — the fight, the weight of the Curator's records, the confrontation with Mordaine beyond the sealed doors — the flame had not gone out.
At the base of the hearth, placed carefully on the stone: a small vial. Glass, sealed with wax, filled with something that moved with the slow warmth of an ember.
The label was in a precise, careful hand. Scholar's handwriting — the kind that has practiced making letters that will last.

steps.text: The label said: FOR WHOEVER FINDS THIS — YOU MAY WANT TO KNOW.
Picking it up, the Curator's voice arrived — thoughtful, engaged, the voice of someone dictating a final entry with genuine interest in the subject.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: I study things. That's all. I study them and I ask why, and sometimes the answers come back and sometimes they don't.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: I've always been fine with the ones that don't. The asking was the point.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: But I want to ask one more. Why did this flame never go out?

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: I carried it for — I don't know how long. I never lit it. It was just burning when I arrived.

lines.speaker: Curator
lines.text: I wonder what they were warming themselves from.

steps.text: The vial was warm. Whatever was inside moved when turned — not a liquid exactly, more like light that had learned to pool.
The hearth flame flickered once, as if acknowledging something. Then settled back to exactly the same height it had always been.
It had the feeling of being studied with genuine interest — of being the subject of a research question that had no answer yet but would be asked carefully, for as long as it took.

steps.name: The Carried Flame
steps.description: A vial of something warm. The Curator's handwriting on the label. Casts a minor AoE fire spell on round one of battle. Tooltip: "Lit before we arrived."
